task_objective: Restore and improve screenshot automation tool.
design_decisions: Improved SPA template to support deep-linking via URL hashes (e.g., #missing, #variables), which facilitates automated testing and screenshotting.
Implemented a robust 'scripts/take_screenshots.py' utility using the chromium-browser CLI instead of Selenium to avoid driver compatibility issues.
Cleaned up dev dependencies by removing Selenium and webdriver-manager.
results: The project now has a maintainable, high-performance screenshot utility that leverages a more robust architectural feature (deep-linking) in the report UI.
